hero.subtitle: Deploy Llama, Mistral, or Phi on hardware we provide. Private to your building. Under one subscription.
hero.badgeFull: Your hardware. Your data. Your building.
hero.subtitleRich: Deploy Llama, Mistral, or Phi on hardware we provide. Private to your building. Under one subscription. Hardware, deployment, monitoring, and support all included.

problem.title: What you get
problem.cloudTaxDesc: We ship and install a dedicated AI system at your location. Llama, Mistral, Phi, or another open model — running on hardware configured for your workload. Your team uses it like any web app. The difference is where it lives.
problem.dataLeakageDesc: Every prompt, every document, every client conversation stays on the device. Nothing transits to a third party. HIPAA-aligned deployment patterns come standard.
problem.item1: Hardware included in every plan — we size it, we install it, we warrant it.
problem.item2: Fine-tuned on your documents, your playbooks, your terminology.
problem.item3: Model-agnostic: Llama, Mistral, Phi, or your choice — swap as needs evolve.

solution.title: How it works
solution.localStackDesc: Private AI running on hardware we provide, configured for your workflow, with models you choose. One subscription covers everything — hardware, deployment, monitoring, updates, and support.
solution.agnosticDesc: Deploy Llama 3, Mistral, Phi, or another open model. Switch freely. No vendor lock-in.
solution.item1: One monthly price. Hardware included. Cancel anytime with 30 days' notice.
solution.item2: Data stays in your building — HIPAA-aligned deployment patterns come standard.
solution.item3: Model-agnostic: swap Llama, Mistral, or Phi as your needs evolve.

solutions.pageSubtitle: Every vertical has unique compliance requirements, workflows, and pain points. We build private AI deployments tailored to your industry.
solutions.dontSeeDesc: Our Agnostic Engine deploys to any vertical. If your business handles sensitive data and you're tired of the cloud tax — we can help.
solutions.heroSubtitle: Every industry has unique compliance requirements, workflows, and data sensitivity. TechFides builds local AI stacks purpose-fit for your vertical — engineered for your industry, not generic cloud subscriptions.
solutions.legalDesc: Attorney-client privilege demands that sensitive case data never touches a third-party cloud. TechFides deploys AI on your firm's hardware so privileged information stays under your roof — while giving your team the power of modern language models for research, drafting, and document review.
solutions.medicalDesc: Patient data is sacred. Every cloud API call is a potential HIPAA violation waiting to happen. TechFides keeps PHI on-premise while enabling AI-powered clinical documentation, coding assistance, and patient communication — without the compliance risk.
solutions.autoDesc: From diagnostics to customer follow-ups, the auto industry runs on data that shouldn't live in someone else's cloud. TechFides delivers AI-powered inventory management, service scheduling, and customer engagement — all running locally.
solutions.tradesDesc: Estimating, scheduling, crew coordination, and client communication — trades businesses generate mountains of operational data. TechFides puts AI to work on your terms, with models trained on your workflows and data that never leaves your office.
solutions.talkToUs: Talk to Us About Your Industry
solutions.dontSeeSubtitle: The TechFides Agnostic Engine adapts to any vertical. If your business handles sensitive data and needs AI that stays local, we can build your stack.

stack.pageSubtitle: A full-stack, model-agnostic AI deployment platform. Every layer is designed for security, performance, and total control.
stack.heroSubtitle: The TechFides Stack is a model-agnostic AI infrastructure deployed on your own hardware. Swap models, scale users, and maintain total data privacy — without rewriting a single integration.
stack.fullStackSubtitle: Five layers working together. Every component runs on your hardware, on your network, under your control.
stack.modelSubtitle: Never get locked into a single AI vendor again. The TechFides Engine supports any open-weight model — and we add new ones monthly.
stack.ctaSubtitle: We'll walk you through the architecture, answer your technical questions, and map the stack to your specific requirements.
stack.layer1Desc: Enterprise-grade compute deployed on-premise. Mac Studio clusters, NVIDIA GPU servers, or custom-spec hardware matched to your workload.
stack.layer1Comp1Detail: Apple Silicon (M-series) or NVIDIA A100/H100 GPU clusters sized to your model requirements and user concurrency.
stack.layer1Comp2Detail: NVMe SSD arrays with RAID redundancy. Your data, your drives, your building. Encrypted at rest with hardware-backed keys.
stack.layer1Comp3Detail: Isolated VLAN deployment on your existing network. Zero internet dependency for inference. Air-gapped option available.
stack.layer2Desc: The core runtime that powers AI inference on your local hardware. Optimized for throughput and latency at enterprise scale.
stack.layer2Comp1Detail: llama.cpp, vLLM, or Ollama-based serving layer optimized for your specific hardware. Sub-second inference for most queries.
stack.layer2Comp2Detail: Hot-swap between models without downtime. Run Llama 3, Mistral, CodeLlama, or domain-specific models simultaneously.
stack.layer2Comp3Detail: Optimized model quantization (GGUF, GPTQ, AWQ) to maximize performance on your hardware without sacrificing output quality.
stack.layer3Desc: The brains of the stack. RAG pipelines, fine-tuning, and prompt engineering tailored to your industry and data.
stack.layer3Comp1Detail: Retrieval-Augmented Generation built on your documents, databases, and knowledge base. ChromaDB or Weaviate running locally.
stack.layer3Comp2Detail: LoRA/QLoRA fine-tuning on your proprietary data. Models learn your terminology, workflows, and business logic over time.
stack.layer3Comp3Detail: Industry-specific system prompts and guardrails. Ensures outputs match your compliance requirements and brand voice.
stack.layer4Desc: The interfaces your team actually uses. Web dashboards, API endpoints, and integrations with your existing tools.
stack.layer4Comp1Detail: Clean, internal-facing chat and workflow UI. Role-based access control. No internet required after deployment.
stack.layer4Comp2Detail: OpenAI-compatible API running on your network. Drop-in replacement for cloud AI in your existing scripts and tools.
stack.layer4Comp3Detail: Pre-built connectors for EHRs, DMS systems, CRMs, and industry tools. Custom webhook and automation support.
stack.layer5Desc: Enterprise security at every layer. Audit trails, encryption, access control, and compliance reporting — built in, not bolted on.
stack.layer5Comp1Detail: Every query, every response, every user action logged with timestamps. Export-ready for compliance audits and legal holds.
stack.layer5Comp2Detail: AES-256 at rest, TLS 1.3 in transit (on your LAN). Hardware security modules (HSM) available for key management.
stack.layer5Comp3Detail: RBAC with Active Directory / LDAP integration. SSO support. Granular permissions by model, function, and data scope.
stack.modelLlamaStrength: General-purpose excellence. Strong reasoning, coding, and instruction-following.
stack.modelMistralStrength: Exceptional efficiency. High performance at smaller model sizes. Great for constrained hardware.
stack.modelCodeLlamaStrength: Purpose-built for code generation, review, and technical documentation.
stack.modelDomainStrength: Medical (BioMistral), Legal (SaulLM), and financial models fine-tuned for your vertical.

partners.pageSubtitle: Earn recurring revenue by connecting businesses with private AI infrastructure. No technical skills required.
partners.heroSubtitle: Your network needs AI that keeps their data local. Every referral you make earns a recurring commission. Join the TechFides Partner Program and turn your relationships into recurring revenue.
partners.step1Desc: Fill out the form below. We'll review and onboard you within 48 hours.
partners.step2Desc: Introduce TechFides to businesses in your network who need local AI.
partners.step3Desc: Our team handles the technical sale, demo, and deployment. You stay informed.
partners.step4Desc: Earn commission on the first 12 months of the referred client's subscription revenue. Paid monthly, alongside the client's billing cycle.
partners.commissionNote: Commission is a percentage of the first 12 months of the referred client's monthly recurring revenue (MRR). Top-performing partners unlock higher tiers.
partners.clientReferralSubtitle: Refer a business and earn subscription credit. Simple.
partners.clientReferralNote: Credits applied directly to your monthly subscription once the referred client signs. No limits on referrals. Stack credits month over month.
partners.applySubtitle: Fill out the form below and we'll get you onboarded within 48 hours.
partners.applicationReceivedDesc: We'll review your application and reach out within 48 hours. Welcome to the TechFides partner network.
partners.networkPlaceholder: How many potential clients could you refer? What industries do they serve?
partners.benefit1Desc: Earn a percentage of the referred client's monthly subscription for the first 12 months. Paid monthly, alongside their billing cycle.
partners.benefit2Desc: Access branded pitch decks, one-pagers, case studies, and ROI calculators. Everything you need to have the conversation with confidence.
partners.benefit3Desc: Real-time visibility into your referrals. See where each lead stands in the pipeline, from introduction to deployment.
partners.benefit4Desc: Bring us into the conversation when you need technical depth. We'll join calls, run demos, and help close — you keep the full commission.
partners.benefit5Desc: Monthly webinars on AI trends, product updates, and sales techniques. Become the AI expert in your network.
partners.benefit6Desc: Partners get first look at new verticals, features, and pricing tiers. Your referrals also get priority onboarding.
partners.type1Desc: You already manage their infrastructure. Now offer AI as a service. TechFides deploys, you earn recurring revenue on a client you already own.
partners.type2Desc: Your clients trust your strategic advice. Recommending private AI infrastructure makes you the advisor who brought real cost savings to the table — and earns you a commission on every deal.
partners.type3Desc: If you serve legal, medical, auto, or trades verticals, you know the pain points. Connect your clients with the solution and get paid for it.
partners.type4Desc: You see the cloud spend on their P&L. Show them a better way. The economics sell themselves.

consulting.pageSubtitle: Before deploying private AI, some organizations need strategic groundwork. TechFides' consulting frameworks — built from decades of Fortune 500 leadership — prepare your business for transformation.
consulting.ai360Desc: A forensic diagnostic of your organization's ability to execute, govern, and extract value from AI. Validate your strategy before you scale.
consulting.transformDesc: Governed execution support that turns strategic ambition into operational capability. We replace 'innovation theater' with rigorous program discipline.
consulting.aegisDesc: The intelligence operating system for the hybrid workforce era. Govern, secure, and scale how humans, AI, and agents work together across six integrated layers.
consulting.pedigreeSubtitle: 25 years of corporate leadership experience from Honeywell, Invensys, and Schneider Electric — supporting all corporate functions and delivering multimillion-dollar projects across North America, Europe, Asia, Africa, and Latin America.
consulting.ctaSubtitle: Most businesses are ready for private AI today. But if you need strategic groundwork first, our consulting frameworks get you there faster.

about.heroParagraph1: For too long, the middle market has been forced to choose between expensive, data-leaking cloud APIs or being left behind entirely.
about.heroParagraph2: TechFides was founded to break that cycle. By combining Fortune 500 engineering discipline with the agility required by modern SMBs, we provide the infrastructure that allows businesses to own their intelligence, secure their data, and eliminate recurring cloud dependency.
about.heroTagline: We don't just deploy AI. We return digital autonomy to the enterprise.
about.globalParagraph1: Headquartered in Frisco, Texas, TechFides operates as a distributed powerhouse with dedicated operations in Guadalajara, Mexico, and Libreville, Gabon. Our footprint allows us to support multi-national infrastructure projects and local AI deployments with equal precision.
about.globalParagraph2: By maintaining deep roots in North America, Latin America, and Africa, we bring a global perspective to solve local engineering challenges — ensuring that AEGIS and our Local Stack are resilient, compliant, and ready for scale in any regulatory environment.
about.officeDescUS: Corporate strategy, product engineering, and North American client operations.
about.officeDescMX: Engineering delivery, Latin American market development, and bilingual support.
about.officeDescGA: CEMAC regional expansion, francophone AI deployments, and emerging market strategy.
about.founderSectionTitle: From the Corporate Boardroom to the Founder's Office
about.founderBio1: Jacques Jean didn't build TechFides in a vacuum. His vision is forged from 25 years of managing multimillion-dollar technology operations for global titans like Honeywell and Schneider Electric — spanning five continents, every corporate function, and some of the most complex regulated environments on earth.
about.founderBio2: After witnessing how enterprise-grade governance was consistently gated behind massive budgets, Jacques transitioned from the corporate boardroom to the founder's office. He saw a gap that no one was closing: the middle market was hemorrhaging money on cloud AI subscriptions, sending sensitive client data to third parties, and getting locked into vendors who controlled their pricing and their future.
about.founderBio3: Today, he draws on his Forbes Technology Council insights and deep infrastructure expertise to ensure TechFides 2.0 provides SMBs with the same "architectural armor" used by the Fortune 500 — at a fraction of the cost, deployed on hardware they own, with data that never leaves their building.
about.valuesSubtitle: These aren't marketing talking points. They're the engineering constraints we build every product around.
about.valueOwnershipDesc: Your data belongs to you. We deploy AI on hardware you own, in buildings you control. Nothing leaves your premises.
about.valueAgnosticismDesc: We don't lock you into one vendor. Deploy Llama, Mistral, Phi, or any open model. Switch freely as the landscape evolves.
about.valueTransparencyDesc: We sell what we would install for our own company. If a deployment won't work for your business, we will tell you — even when it costs us the deal.
about.valuePerspectiveDesc: Built from 25 years of deploying technology across North America, Europe, Asia, Africa, and Latin America. We understand local nuance at global scale.
about.milestone1Desc: 25 years at Honeywell, Invensys, and Schneider Electric — managing multimillion-dollar technology operations, supporting all corporate functions, and delivering critical infrastructure across five continents.
about.milestone2Desc: Recognized for thought leadership in enterprise technology strategy and digital transformation.
about.milestone3Desc: Selected for the Goldman Sachs 10,000 Small Businesses program — bridging Fortune 500 discipline with SMB agility.
about.milestone4Desc: Launched with a singular mission: bring enterprise-grade technology governance to the underserved middle market.
about.milestone5Desc: Recognized that SMBs were hemorrhaging to cloud AI costs and data leakage. Built the TechFides Local Stack — enterprise AI on local hardware.
about.milestone6Desc: Launched the AEGIS Intelligence Operating System for the hybrid workforce era — governing, securing, and scaling human + AI + agent operations across six integrated layers.
about.ctaSubtitle: Whether you need private AI infrastructure, strategic consulting, or a referral partnership — we're ready to talk.

solutionShared.stackSubtitle: Purpose-built AI infrastructure for your industry. Deployed on your hardware. Under your control.
solutionShared.step1Desc: We audit your current workflows, data volume, and compliance requirements to scope your deployment.
solutionShared.step2Desc: Hardware installed on-site. Models fine-tuned to your industry. Data stays in your building from day one.
solutionShared.step3Desc: Your subscription includes monitoring, model updates, and scaling as your needs grow. Fixed monthly price — same bill every month.
solutionShared.bottomCtaSubtitle: Local infrastructure, fine-tuned for how you actually work. Private to your building. Under one subscription. Purpose-built for

solutionLegal.tagline: AI for Law Firms & Legal Teams
solutionLegal.headline:
Privilege-Protected
AI for Legal
solutionLegal.subheadline: Attorney-client privilege isn't optional. Every cloud API call with case data is a potential breach of that privilege. TechFides deploys AI on your firm's own hardware — so confidential information never leaves your building.
solutionLegal.pain1Desc: Sending case data to OpenAI, Google, or any cloud API means your client's privileged information now sits on someone else's server. One breach, one subpoena, and privilege is waived.
solutionLegal.pain2Desc: Per-seat AI subscriptions across your firm add up fast — often $5K to $15K a month. Tools you rent, data pipelines you don't control, and a bill that grows every quarter as the vendors raise prices.
solutionLegal.pain3Desc: When your AI vendor changes pricing, shuts down a model, or gets acquired — your workflows break overnight. Your firm's productivity shouldn't depend on someone else's roadmap.
solutionLegal.feat1Desc: AI-powered document review and analysis that runs entirely on your local network. Review contracts, case files, and discovery documents without any data leaving your firm's infrastructure.
solutionLegal.feat2Desc: A local AI research tool trained on legal databases and your firm's own precedent library. Get case law citations, statute summaries, and argument analysis — all on-premise.
solutionLegal.feat3Desc: Generate first drafts, redline existing contracts, and flag non-standard clauses. The model learns your firm's preferred language and clause library over time.
solutionLegal.feat4Desc: Draft client updates, summarize case progress, and generate billing narratives. Trained on your firm's communication style and client relationship protocols.
solutionLegal.feat5Desc: Process and categorize thousands of documents for relevance, privilege, and responsiveness. Cut eDiscovery timelines by 60-80% without exposing a single document to the cloud.
solutionLegal.feat6Desc: Full logging of every AI interaction. Know exactly what was queried, by whom, and when. Complete audit trail for bar association compliance and malpractice protection.
solutionLegal.testimonialQuote: We were spending $12,000/month on AI tools and sending client data to three different cloud providers. TechFides gave us a single local stack that's faster, cheaper, and doesn't keep me up at night worrying about privilege.

solutionMedical.headline:
HIPAA-Compliant
AI for Healthcare
solutionMedical.subheadline: Patient data is the most regulated information in America. Every cloud AI call with PHI is a compliance event. TechFides deploys healthcare AI on your facility's own hardware — so protected health information never crosses your network boundary.
solutionMedical.pain1Desc: Cloud AI providers require BAAs, but a BAA doesn't prevent breaches — it just assigns liability. Every API call with patient data is a potential violation point that grows your attack surface.
solutionMedical.pain2Desc: Physicians spend 2 hours on documentation for every 1 hour of patient care. Cloud AI tools help but create new compliance headaches. Your staff needs AI assistance without the regulatory risk.
solutionMedical.pain3Desc: Patient data lives in your EHR, billing system, lab interfaces, and imaging archives. Cloud AI sees fragments. Local AI can securely integrate across all systems on your network.
solutionMedical.feat1Desc: AI-assisted note-taking, SOAP note generation, and discharge summaries — running on your local hardware. Integrates with your EHR (Epic, Cerner, Athena) without sending PHI to external servers.
solutionMedical.feat2Desc: Automated ICD-10, CPT, and HCPCS code suggestions based on clinical documentation. Reduce coding errors and accelerate billing cycles with on-premise AI that learns your practice's patterns.
solutionMedical.feat3Desc: Generate appointment reminders, follow-up instructions, and patient education materials. Personalized to each patient's condition and literacy level, all processed locally.
solutionMedical.feat4Desc: AI-powered prior auth letter generation with clinical justification pulled from the patient record. Cut auth turnaround from days to hours without exposing records to cloud services.
solutionMedical.feat5Desc: Drug interaction checking, differential diagnosis suggestions, and evidence-based treatment recommendations — all running against your local patient database and medical knowledge base.
solutionMedical.feat6Desc: Real-time monitoring of every AI interaction. Complete audit trail showing data access patterns, user activity, and compliance status. Export-ready for OCR audits and attestation.
solutionMedical.testimonialQuote: Our physicians were drowning in documentation. Cloud AI tools helped but our compliance officer was losing sleep. TechFides gave us the same AI power with zero PHI leaving our facility. Our docs save 90 minutes a day and compliance is airtight.

solutionAuto.headline:
Private AI for
the Auto Industry
solutionAuto.subheadline: Customer financial data, service histories, and deal jackets contain some of the most sensitive information in retail. The FTC Safeguards Rule now demands you protect it. TechFides deploys AI on your lot's own hardware — so customer data stays under your roof.
solutionAuto.pain1Desc: The updated FTC Safeguards Rule requires auto dealers to implement comprehensive data security programs. Every cloud AI call with customer financial data increases your compliance exposure and audit risk.
solutionAuto.pain2Desc: Your DMS, CRM, service scheduler, and parts inventory don't talk to each other — and cloud AI can only see what you upload. Local AI integrates directly with every system on your network.
solutionAuto.pain3Desc: Credit applications, trade-in appraisals, and service records flow through multiple cloud tools daily. Each one is a potential leak point for customer PII and financial information.
solutionAuto.feat1Desc: AI-powered demand forecasting, pricing optimization, and turn-rate analysis running against your DMS data in real-time.
solutionAuto.feat2Desc: Diagnostic assistance, repair time estimates, and parts lookup powered by local AI. Technicians get instant recommendations while customer vehicle data stays on your network.
solutionAuto.feat3Desc: Automated follow-ups, service reminders, and personalized offers generated from your CRM data. Every message is tailored to the customer's history — processed locally, sent from your systems.
solutionAuto.feat4Desc: Real-time deal structuring, lender matching, and profit analysis. Your F&I team gets AI-powered recommendations without customer financial data leaving your dealership's network.
solutionAuto.feat5Desc: AI-generated review responses, sentiment analysis across platforms, and CSI prediction. Monitor and manage your online reputation with local AI that understands your brand voice.
solutionAuto.feat6Desc: If you operate multiple locations, get a unified AI layer across all rooftops. Compare performance, share best practices, and maintain consistent operations — all on your private infrastructure.
solutionAuto.testimonialQuote: We were using five different cloud tools across sales, service, and F&I. TechFides consolidated everything into one local AI stack. Our data is secure, our teams are faster, and we passed our FTC audit without a single finding.

solutionTrades.headline:
Operations AI for
the Trades
solutionTrades.subheadline: Estimating, scheduling, crew management, and client communication eat up hours every day. Cloud tools help — but they also mean your bid strategies, client lists, and operational data sit on someone else's server. TechFides puts AI to work on your hardware.
solutionTrades.pain1Desc: Every bid takes hours of manual calculation. You lose jobs because you can't estimate fast enough — or worse, you win jobs with bad numbers because you rushed. Cloud AI sees your margins. Local AI protects them.
solutionTrades.pain2Desc: Crews, materials, inspections, and weather don't sync themselves. Your dispatcher juggles it all manually while cloud tools only see part of the picture. Local AI integrates everything on one system.
solutionTrades.pain3Desc: Job sites don't always have reliable internet. Cloud-dependent tools fail exactly when your crews need them most. TechFides local AI works on your network — with or without an internet connection.
solutionTrades.feat1Desc: Generate accurate estimates in minutes, not hours. The AI learns from your historical bids, material costs, and labor rates to produce estimates that reflect your actual margins — not industry averages.
solutionTrades.feat2Desc: Optimize crew assignments, material deliveries, and inspection windows automatically. The AI accounts for travel time, skill sets, equipment availability, and weather forecasts.
solutionTrades.feat3Desc: Automated project updates, appointment confirmations, and follow-up sequences. Each message is personalized to the job scope and client history — generated locally from your CRM data.
solutionTrades.feat4Desc: Real-time tracking of labor hours, material costs, and change orders against the original estimate. Know which jobs are profitable before they're done, not after.
solutionTrades.feat5Desc: AI-organized job photos, permit documents, inspection reports, and warranty paperwork. Automatically categorized and linked to the right job — searchable in seconds.
solutionTrades.feat6Desc: Track completion rates, quality metrics, and efficiency by crew, foreman, or individual. Identify training needs and top performers with data that stays in your office.
solutionTrades.testimonialQuote: Our estimator was spending 4 hours per bid. With TechFides, we generate accurate estimates in 30 minutes. We're bidding 3x more jobs with better margins — and our competitors have no idea how we got so fast.

aegis.heroSubtitle: Every organization is becoming a hybrid workforce. AEGIS gives you the operating system to govern, secure, and scale how humans, AI, and agents work together — without the chaos.
aegis.layersSubtitle: AEGIS integrates governance, security, intelligence, execution, operations, and leadership into a single cohesive framework.
aegis.layerGovernanceDesc: Policy frameworks, decision rights, and accountability structures for AI adoption.
aegis.layerSecurityDesc: Data protection, threat monitoring, and continuity planning for hybrid operations.
aegis.layerIntelligenceDesc: Analytics, reporting, and predictive insights across human and AI workflows.
aegis.layerExecutionDesc: Implementation methodology, change management, and deployment discipline.
aegis.layerOperationsDesc: Workflow orchestration, process automation, and operational efficiency.
aegis.layerLeadershipDesc: Executive dashboards, adoption tracking, and strategic alignment.
aegis.howItWorksSubtitle: Five phases that take you from fragmented AI adoption to a governed, scalable hybrid workforce.
aegis.stepDiagnoseDesc: We assess your AI readiness, operating model, and team capability across all six layers.
aegis.stepDesignDesc: Custom AEGIS architecture mapped to your industry, compliance requirements, and growth goals.
aegis.stepImplementDesc: Phased deployment with defined milestones, training, and governance activation.
aegis.stepOperateDesc: Managed oversight, performance monitoring, and continuous optimization.
aegis.stepEvolveDesc: Quarterly reviews, capability expansion, and emerging technology integration.
aegis.marketsSubtitle: Whether you run a 5,000-person enterprise or a 20-person professional firm, AEGIS scales to your reality.
aegis.enterpriseCap1: Operating model redesign for 500+ person organizations
aegis.smbCap1: Practical AI workflows that save 10+ hours per week
aegis.securityTitle: Security, Trust & Resilience — Built In, Not Bolted On
aegis.securitySubtitle: Every AEGIS deployment includes a resilience framework — continuity planning, threat monitoring, and incident response protocols designed for hybrid human + AI operations.
aegis.complianceSubtitle: Designed to support organizations operating under strict regulatory frameworks.
aegis.artifactsSubtitle: Every Core Implementation ships the same 18 deliverables — policies, dashboards, runbooks, and playbooks your board, auditors, and insurers recognize. No consulting fog. No custom-scoping games.
aegis.artifactsFooter: Diagnostic engagements touch all six layers at audit depth. Core and Enterprise engagements ship all 18 artifacts in their finished form, then hand them to a running managed-governance retainer.
aegis.pricingSubtitlePart1: AEGIS engagements land your company in a running governance operating model — not a PDF, not a slide deck. Core and above
aegis.pricingSubtitlePart2: a managed retainer so the system we install continues to run.
aegis.tierDiagFeat1: AI readiness scan across all 6 layers
aegis.tierCoreFeat2: Governance operating model activated, not documented
aegis.tierCoreFeat5: Engagement closes only when retainer is live
aegis.tierEntFeat1: Organization-wide deployment across BUs or sites
aegis.tierEntFeat2: Vertical + regulatory mapping (HIPAA, SOC 2, NIST AI RMF)
aegis.tierEntFeat3: Named fractional CISO + dedicated program manager
aegis.tierEntFeat5: Retainer scales with scope — not optional
aegis.ctaTitle: Ready to See What AEGIS Looks Like for Your Organization?
aegis.ctaSubtitle: Start with a 30-minute discovery call. No pitch deck, no pressure — just a candid conversation about where your organization stands and whether AEGIS is the right fit.
aegis.ctaAssessLink: take the free AI Readiness Assessment first

ai360.heroSubtitle: A 60-question distributed intelligence system that captures real organizational signals across 6 domains, identifies risks and opportunities, and delivers a clear, prioritized roadmap for AI execution.
ai360.heroSubtitle2: This is not a survey. It is a network-level diagnostic engine deployed across your leadership, IT, operations, and compliance teams simultaneously.
ai360.whyFailDesc: Most AI failures don't happen because of bad models. They happen because organizations attempt to scale on top of fractured data, immature governance, and undefined use cases.
ai360.pilotTrapDesc: 70% of enterprise AI pilots never reach production because the underlying infrastructure and organizational readiness were never validated.
ai360.ourApproachDesc: We deploy the assessment across your leadership team, IT, operations, and compliance leads simultaneously — capturing a distributed intelligence signal, not a single biased perspective.
ai360.domainsSubtitle: A 360-degree evaluation across every critical layer that determines AI success or failure. 10 questions per domain, 60 total.
ai360.outputSubtitle: Real intelligence, not generic slides. Here's a sample of what your leadership team receives.
ai360.sampleNote: Sample output from a mid-market assessment. Actual scores and findings are unique to each organization.
ai360.networkSubtitle: This is where we separate from 95% of the market. Instead of one person answering, we deploy the assessment across your entire organization simultaneously.
ai360.networkResult: The result: a distributed intelligence capture that reveals executive vs. operational misalignment, departmental blind spots, and the real organizational truth about AI readiness.
ai360.securitySubtitle: Government agencies and regulated enterprises trust the AI 360 platform because your data never leaves your control. Every assessment runs under a zero-trust architecture with full privacy guarantees.
ai360.deliveryDesc: A structured engagement with a secure digital portal. Your team accesses the assessment via a private link — no software to install.
ai360.pricingDesc: Fixed-price packages. Scoped deliverables. Predictable outcomes.
ai360.positionSubtitle: It Is a System of Record for AI Transformation.
ai360.finalCtaSubtitle: Most AI programs fail on alignment, data foundations, and execution readiness — not technology. AI Readiness 360 gives your leadership the shared picture needed to move forward with confidence.

transformation.heroSubtitle: A resource-based consulting engagement. You get senior consultants — each bringing deep domain expertise, proven AI fluency, and certified program management discipline — embedded with your team to drive transformation across your digital business model, digital operations, and digital office.
transformation.transformSubtitle: Our comprehensive AI transformation management service guides your organization through every stage of AI adoption, from strategy and planning to implementation and optimization.
transformation.transformTagline: Strategic AI Implementation for Enterprise Success
transformation.pillarsSubtitle: We don't just implement technology; we restructure how value is created, delivered, and governed.
transformation.engagementSubtitle: We structure our partnership to match your specific needs, maturity, and internal capabilities.
transformation.resultsSubtitle: We don't just deliver slides. We deliver operational capabilities and tangible business value.
transformation.pricingSubtitle: Fixed-scope pricing aligned to your transformation maturity. Every engagement includes executive briefing, stakeholder alignment, and a governed delivery framework.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.section1Body: TechFides LLC is committed to protecting the privacy and security of your personal information. This Privacy Policy describes how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard information when you visit our website at techfides.com, use our services, or engage with us in any capacity. By accessing our website or using our services, you acknowledge that you have read and understand this Privacy Policy.
privacy.section2Body: We collect information you voluntarily provide, including contact information when you fill out forms or request a consultation. We may also automatically collect device and browser information, IP address, pages visited, and cookies. We may receive information from business partners and publicly available sources.
privacy.section3Body: We use the information we collect to provide and improve our services, respond to inquiries, process Partner Program applications, send relevant updates, analyze website usage, comply with legal obligations, and protect against fraud.
privacy.section4Body: We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal information. We may share information with service providers under strict confidentiality agreements, professional advisors, law enforcement when required by law, and in connection with business transactions.
privacy.section5Body: When we deploy AI infrastructure on your premises, your operational data remains entirely within your control. We do not access, store, process, or transmit any client data processed by our deployed AI systems unless explicitly authorized in writing.
privacy.section6Body: Our website uses cookies and similar technologies including essential cookies, analytics cookies, and preference cookies. You can control cookie preferences through your browser settings.
privacy.section7Body: We implement industry-standard technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information, including encryption in transit and at rest, access controls, regular security assessments, and employee training.
privacy.section8Body: We retain personal information only as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes for which it was collected, comply with legal obligations, resolve disputes, and enforce our agreements.
privacy.section9Body: Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have the right to access, correct, delete, restrict, or port your personal information. To exercise these rights, contact us at legal@techfides.com. We will respond within 30 days.
privacy.section10Body: TechFides operates from the United States, Mexico, and Gabon. We take appropriate safeguards to ensure your information is protected regardless of where it is processed.
privacy.section11Body: Our services are not directed to individuals under 18 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children.
privacy.section12Body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated effective date.
privacy.section13Body: If you have questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us.

terms.title: Terms of
terms.section1Body: These Terms of Service constitute a legally binding agreement between you and TechFides LLC, a company registered in the State of Texas, United States. By accessing our website or engaging our services, you agree to be bound by these Terms.
terms.section2Body: TechFides provides enterprise AI deployment, consulting, and technology transformation services, including sovereign AI infrastructure deployment, AI Readiness 360 assessment, AI Transformation Management, AEGIS Intelligence Operating System, and referral partner program management.
terms.section3Body: Our services are intended for businesses and organizations. By engaging our services, you represent that you are at least 18 years of age and have the legal authority to bind your organization to these Terms.
terms.section4Body: As a Client, you agree to provide accurate information, ensure necessary hardware and access, designate authorized personnel, comply with applicable laws, and make timely payments.
terms.section5Body: Subscription pricing is published on the Pricing page and confirmed in your signed order form. Monthly subscriptions are billed on the anniversary of your activation date; annual subscriptions are billed on the anniversary of your activation date with two months included. Invoices are due within 30 days. Late payments may incur a 1.5% monthly charge. Separately, enterprise consulting engagements (AI Readiness 360, AI Transformation, AEGIS) are scoped and priced in individual engagement agreements.
terms.section6Body: All client data processed by TechFides-deployed AI systems remains the exclusive property of the Client. TechFides does not access, copy, transmit, or retain any client data unless explicitly authorized in writing.
terms.section7Body: All TechFides proprietary methodologies, frameworks, and tools remain the exclusive intellectual property of TechFides LLC. Client data and proprietary information remain the exclusive property of the Client. AI models are subject to their respective open-source licenses.
terms.section8Body: Both parties agree to maintain the confidentiality of proprietary or sensitive information. This obligation survives termination for three years.
terms.section9Body: TechFides warrants professional service delivery. Except as stated, services are provided "as is" without warranties. TechFides does not guarantee specific business outcomes or ROI projections.
terms.section10Body: TechFides' total liability shall not exceed the total fees paid during the twelve months preceding the claim. TechFides shall not be liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages.
terms.section11Body: You agree to indemnify TechFides from claims arising from your breach of these Terms, misuse of AI systems, violation of laws, or third-party claims related to your use of services.
terms.section12Body: These Terms remain in effect as long as you use our services. You may cancel your subscription at any time with 30 days' written notice; upon cancellation, we will coordinate return of any loaned hardware via a prepaid shipping box. Consulting engagements may be terminated as specified in the individual engagement agreement. Upon termination, all outstanding fees for services rendered become immediately due.
terms.section13Body: Participation in the Referral Partner Program is subject to approval. Commission structures may be updated with 30 days' notice. TechFides reserves the right to modify the program at any time.
terms.section14Body: These Terms are governed by the laws of the State of Texas. Disputes shall be submitted to binding arbitration in Collin County, Texas, under the rules of the American Arbitration Association.
terms.section15Body: TechFides reserves the right to modify these Terms at any time. Material changes will be communicated via email or website notification.
terms.section16Body: If any provision is unenforceable, the remaining provisions continue. These Terms constitute the entire agreement between the parties.
terms.section17Body: For questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us.
